title: Anybody planing on translating the new Blu Rays
display_title: Anybody planing on translating the new Blu Rays
wikitext:
[]: Anybody planing on translating the new Blu-Rays?             Quote Post by chulove » Sun Jun 28, 2015 5:06 am I have already purchased my blu-ray set of the Evangelion and was thinking of putting subs or maybe even the dub for this. I was wondering if anybody was thinking of doing the same thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jun 28, 2015 5:20 am The commentary project is an attempt to do a full translation from the storyboards, and look at the rate of progress on that. Taking the existing scripts and doing the timing should be a tractable DIY project.

[]:             Quote Post by chulove » Sun Jun 28, 2015 7:02 am I own the ADV's platinums release and was thinking of either using the subs or the dub from it. I my self have never done this before and this will be my first attempt to doing anything like this. I checked out the site you mentioned and looks complete, would you say it's a better translation than what ADV has? Would it worth the effortt to make the subs from scratcht than to use older ones?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Jun 28, 2015 7:46 am I am just gonna rip the ADV subs and maybe do some tweaking with Aegisub so they're not nearly as ugly as the ADV walls of texts that would cover over half the screen at times. I'll probably do one that includes the radio and TV in the background, and one that does not.

[]:             Quote Post by chulove » Sun Jun 28, 2015 8:17 am That's what I had in mind and with what Mr. Tines mentioned before I think I'm going to try to use both and and see if ADV might of missed something or what not. And as for video and audio I was thinking of using makemkv but I'm not sure if that is the best program to use. Does makemkv compress video and audio or is it uncompresseda and lossless? Also it always combines episodes witch is kinda annoying.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jun 28, 2015 8:19 am chulove wrote: I checked out the site you mentioned and looks complete

[]:             Quote Post by chulove » Sun Jun 28, 2015 8:58 am Ah I see my mistake, well then I guess it doesn't make a difference now if I just use the platinum subs.
